profiles.title: Greek Surface Prospective New Terms
profiles.context_rule: ELS center verse contains normalized target as surface text
profiles.source_term_files: user-requested 2026-05-21 Greek term source, after prior-evidence screening
profiles.excluded_prior: all terms and patterns already present in Greek expanded surface, Greek surface prospective evidence, and centered occurrence evidence
profiles.candidate_rule: all four Greek NT sources have exact-center surface pattern with normalized length >= 5
profiles.primary_row_outcome: selected row beats same-length controls by all-source exact-center surface-pattern count
profiles.primary_study_outcome: BH q <= 0.05 across all tested selected rows

profiles.title: Greek Lexicon Extension Prospective
profiles.candidate_type: fresh Strong's Greek lexicon exact-center same-skip extension rows
profiles.context_rule: extension row must retain exact-center target placement
profiles.controls: stage A 5000 matched term controls and 5000 random controls; stage B 20000/20000 confirmation completed for all-source survivors
profiles.source_term_files: morphgnt/strongs-dictionary-xml Strong's Greek Dictionary XML CC0 headwords
profiles.dedupe_rule: language + normalized Greek headword, lowest Strong number kept as row id
profiles.excluded_prior: exact and substring overlap against registered Greek extension and surface prior evidence
profiles.candidate_rule: all four Greek NT sources preserve the exact-center same-skip extension row
profiles.primary_row_outcome: Stage B corrected q value <= 0.05 after all-source exact-center extension rule, then context-cautioned manual review
profiles.primary_study_outcome: numeric Stage B survivor rows were all common-pronoun αυτου patterns with surface-context risk; strict Greek stopword follow-up left zero all-source extension keys; review material only

profiles.title: Hebrew Modern Geopolitical Version Presence
profiles.controls: representative MT_WLC and UHB shuffled-term/random controls
profiles.excluded_prior: full broad-screen result rows are prior evidence and must not be relabeled as discovery
profiles.candidate_rule: predeclared exact ref-key source-version presence, reported as distribution not claim support
profiles.primary_row_outcome: version-presence scope plus representative-control q value

profiles.title: Gog Magog Prophetic Symbol Pair Controls
profiles.context_rule: pair endpoints occur in the same chapter or registered passage window
profiles.controls: length-matched prophetic-symbol pair controls plus synthetic null pairs
profiles.source_term_files: fixed Gog/Magog plus matched prophetic-symbol cohort
profiles.dedupe_rule: ordered concept pair + corpus + skip + direction
profiles.excluded_prior: previous Gog/Magog strict pair rows and synthetic pair baselines are prior evidence
profiles.candidate_rule: Gog/Magog pair compactness beats matched prophetic-symbol and synthetic pair baselines
profiles.primary_row_outcome: same-chapter same-signed-skip pair count versus controls
profiles.primary_study_outcome: BH q <= 0.05 after all registered pair comparisons

profiles.title: Hebrew Gospel/Genealogy Prospective
profiles.context_rule: version-presence matrix; no surface-context promotion before clean lock
profiles.controls: representative MT_WLC and UHB shuffled-term/random controls
profiles.source_term_files: user-requested 2026-05-21 Hebrew Gospel/genealogy target list, after prior-evidence screening
profiles.excluded_prior: all rows selected from the relaxed all-codes queue plus exact/review overlaps from prior term and centered occurrence evidence
profiles.candidate_rule: predeclared exact ref-key source-version presence, reported as distribution not claim support
profiles.primary_row_outcome: version-presence scope plus representative-control q value
profiles.primary_study_outcome: source-distribution report until clean locked cohort is promoted

profiles.title: Hebrew Concordance Words Prospective
profiles.context_rule: version-presence matrix; no surface-context promotion before clean lock
profiles.controls: representative MT_WLC and UHB shuffled-term/random controls after clean lock
profiles.source_term_files: OpenScriptures StrongHebrewG headwords cross-checked against STEP Bible TAHOT main lexical tags
profiles.excluded_prior: all exact/review overlaps from prior term pools and centered occurrence evidence
profiles.candidate_rule: headword is in StrongHebrewG, normalized length >= 4, and appears as STEP TAHOT main lexical tag
profiles.primary_row_outcome: version-presence scope plus representative-control q value
profiles.primary_study_outcome: source-distribution report until a clean locked cohort is promoted

profiles.title: Local Terms Negative Appendix
profiles.controls: representative controls only for nonzero rows
profiles.excluded_prior: wide-focus local term rows are prior evidence
profiles.candidate_rule: document absent, source-specific, or ordinary controlled rows
profiles.primary_row_outcome: presence/absence and representative-control q when applicable
profiles.primary_study_outcome: transparent negative/curiosity appendix; no claim-level outcome

profiles.title: KJVA Apocrypha Bridge Prospective
profiles.context_rule: expanded KJVA stream; row must cross canonical/apocrypha boundary
profiles.controls: 5000 shuffled apocrypha-block samples plus same-length non-Bible insertion controls
profiles.source_term_files: fixed KJVA apocrypha/deuterocanon proper-name prospective list
profiles.excluded_prior: post-screen KJVA bridge confirmatory rows remain review-only prior evidence
profiles.candidate_rule: fixed term produces boundary-crossing ELS row under registered skip/direction settings
profiles.primary_row_outcome: observed bridge rows versus shuffled term-level sample max and non-Bible insertion totals
profiles.primary_study_outcome: negative: no term survives BH q <= 0.05 and one non-Bible control matches the observed total
